reasoning: The document contains a major structural defect where bulleted lists inside table cells were extracted as plain text using literal bullet characters rather than proper structured list elements. This negatively impacts accessibility for screen reader users. With 1 major defect, the document must be routed to human review for correction.

concerns.analysis: The source document contains several unordered (bulleted) lists describing the sub-topics for each agenda item. In the output JSON, these lists are extracted as plain text within the table cells, using literal bullet characters ('•') and newline characters instead of proper structured list elements. This breaks accessibility, as screen readers will read the bullet characters instead of recognizing a list structure.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
• Cost share payments received.
• Funds expended.
concerns.output_quote: "Project Finance Update\n• Cost share payments received.\n• Funds expended."
concerns.location: Row 1, Column 1 (and similar in subsequent rows)

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 1 table(s) have time values in <th> cells: "2:00-2:10"
concerns.analysis: data_in_th_time=1, no_th_tables=0. Minor semantic markup issues: tables lack <th> elements or use time values as headers. These affect screen reader context but are less severe than data misrepresentation.

action_items: Convert plain text bulleted items inside table cells into proper structured list elements (<ul>, <li>).
Review table headers to ensure proper semantic markup for time values.
